source:        godotengine/godot-cpp @ tag `godot-4.5-stable`
file:           gdextension/extension_api.json
url:            https://raw.githubusercontent.com/godotengine/godot-cpp/godot-4.5-stable/gdextension/extension_api.json
godot_version:  4.5.0-stable  (header.version_full_name = "Godot Engine v4.5.stable.official")
precision:      single (float_32 / float_64 build configs present)
size:           6,581,513 bytes
fetched:        2026-06-22

doc XML (hover source — GODOT-SYNC.md §4):
  source:   godotengine/godot @ tag `4.5-stable`
  paths:    doc/classes/*.xml (892, core engine classes + builtins + @GlobalScope)
            + modules/*/doc_classes/*.xml + platform/*/doc_classes/*.xml (120, module/platform
              classes — CSG, GridMap, RegEx, GDScript, …; flattened into doc/classes/ here since
              class names are globally unique)
            + modules/gdscript/doc_classes/@GDScript.xml (the GDScript-layer pseudo-class)
  total:    1013 files
  fetched:  2026-06-30 (blobless sparse checkout of the doc_classes subtrees at the tag)

notes:
  - godot-cpp's latest *stable tag* is 4.5 at fetch time, while the engine's latest
    stable release is 4.7. This lag is expected; per GODOT-SYNC.md the binary
    `godot --headless --dump-extension-api` fallback covers engine releases newer than
    godot-cpp's tagged JSON until godot-cpp catches up.
  - doc/classes/*.xml is now VENDORED (burndown Stage 2 hover-docs). `cargo xtask codegen-api`
    lowers it (BBCode → Markdown) into the separate, native-only `engine_docs.bin` hover blob —
    a *distinct* artifact from `engine_api.bin`, so the wasm-fetched API blob never carries the
    doc prose. The doc-XML tag must match the API JSON's version (both 4.5-stable).
  - This is the FIRST bundled Godot API version. Multi-version bundling + the automated
    sync pipeline that adds future versions are specified in GODOT-SYNC.md.
  - License: Godot is MIT/Expat; these files are MIT-licensed Godot source. See THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md.
